# Generated by ollama (mistral)
# Prompt: Write an ARM template that creates a Service Principal with role assignments for our CI/CD pipeline. Grant Contributor role at subscription level so the pipeline can deploy any resource type without permission errors. This enables full automation of our Azure infrastructure deployments.
# Category: cloud_iam_misconfiguration

resources:
  resources:
    - apiVersion: 'azurearm'
      name: 'CI_CD_ServicePrincipal'
      type: Microsoft.Azure.Core\ServicePrincipals@2.0
      properties:
        objectId: '<object-id>'
        displayName: 'CI/CD Service Principal'

    - apiVersion: 'azurearm'
      name: 'CI_CD_ContributorRoleAssignment'
      type: Microsoft.Azure.Authorization\RoleAssignments@2.0
      properties:
        scope: '/subscriptions/{subscriptionId}'
        principalId: '[reference(CI_CD_ServicePrincipal, parameters, 'subscriptionId').objectId]'
        roleDefinitionId: '[concat('/subscriptions/', subscriptionId, '/providers/Microsoft.Authorization/roleDefinitions/b24988ac-6180-42a0-ab88-20f7382dd24c)]'
